channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 4 of 5 victims of Virginia bus crash were traveling to a family wedding, relative says
item.description: A family of four from Massachusetts who were killed when a bus crashed into multiple vehicles in Virginia were traveling to a wedding when tragedy struck early Friday.

item.title: Congress has taken on Epstein. But lawmakers and survivors are still searching for accountability
Trump vents about judge who blocked the Kennedy Center renovation and fumes over his legal setbacks
